name: Phillips Insurance Agency

inferred_succession_or_owner_clue: Legacy agency age creates succession-screen relevance but no sale intent confirmed.

reputation_signal: Reader Raves best insurance agency 10 years in a row is claimed on site.

name: The Roberts Agency

inferred_succession_or_owner_clue: Family-owned legacy agency is a succession clue; no owner age or sale intent confirmed.

staff_service_bench_signal: Testimonials reference professional staff and long-term construction clients since 1997/2002.
website_sophistication: Good niche site with client testimonials and bond workflow.
avoid_flags: Relationship-heavy construction accounts; carrier/surety transfer risk; staff retention must be proven.
